pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py explicitly require creating an index named 'auth_metrics'.
Task description requires configuring the index as a 'Metrics' index, checked as 'metric' datatype in verifier.py.
Task description and verifier.py require saving the query as a scheduled report named 'Auth_Metrics_Rollup'.
Task description and verifier.py require piping the results to the 'mcollect' command.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world log data downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub (Zenodo). The required Splunk metrics pipeline configuration parameters (index name 'auth_metrics', datatype 'metric', report name 'Auth_Metrics_Rollup', and command 'mcollect') are explicitly enforced by the task description and verifier.py scripts.
